features: Promotion Version 2.
Support Multi Price for OneRewards member.
Support Member Price for OneRewards member.
Add an on-screen keyboard for the remarks in custom payment.
Add "Change Sales Type" access right control.
Print Barcode at frontend to support encoded cost.
Customize email content for eInvoice submission mail.
Enhance point redemption feature.
Purge transaction to include purging PosOrder and PosOrderDtl table.
Remove full sync button in synchronize at More Function.
Additional item related field in POS receipt report design.
Support OneRewards member promotion.
Add option to enable/disable display last scanned barcode on transaction screen.
fixes: Fix Payment Analysis Report with POS AR Payment filter issue.
Fix Multi-Dimensional POS Analysis report incorrect which multiply by item row.
Fix POS Audit Trail return document referred to wrong document no.
Fix not able to create more than 1 total discount by amount.
Fix POS Session Report Date Time to follow Open Counter Time instead of Start Time.
Fix import transaction from backend to frontend then could not preview transaction issue.
Fix submit eInvoice status will still stay as false under certain condition after delete trade-in item row.
Fix using syntax '-' discount will force apply discount by unit price.
Fix Pos Posting Journal Entry not balance issue when transaction return by point has rounding adjustment.
Fix unset FOC at shortcut key did not refresh the transaction total.
Fix Sales Order not posted unable to void if has delivered item.
Fix Sales Order prompt backorder if recall from hold bill.
Fix start eInvoice services will auto create pos session as admin user.
Fix batch print at pos transaction viewer issue.
Fix Identity type always set as MyKAD when submit eInvoice.
Fix promotion can be deleted even after used that cause promotion listing show empty.
Fix promotion to remove range set when using OneRewards.
Fix after clear all transaction, system did not force logout and caused issue if continue to use.
Fix weighing scale with update unit price settings not working.
Fix items with must generate eInvoice and RM10K and above double submission if using Sales Order.
Fix concurrency error from hold bill involving multiple terminal.
Fix frontend display pole currency at configuration settings not working as intended.

features: Clear transaction support filtered by date range.
Show last scanned barcode/item code on transaction screen.
Pos Transaction Viewer to add "Is Security Deposit" in column chooser.
Design Fast Selection menu to have range set.
Pos Sales Report to add non-member and non-debtor filter.
Support mailing list function on the frontend.
Pos Transaction Viewer to add "Self Billed Doc No" in column chooser.
Enhance Pos Menu Items to be able to sync by batch.
Auto-populate the state field based on the Malaysian postcode on the Customer Info screen.
Remove synchronization of the report.
Add feature to publish report design from the backend to the frontend terminal.
Refactor email sending to use outbound email API service.
When reading MyKad, use the GMPCName instead of the Name field.
Repost POS transaction to include repost tariff code as according to stock item maintenance.
Add Fix Fast Selection Menu in POS management studio.
Print the serial number on the second line of the item description on the receipt.
Enhance backorder control behaviour for recall hold bill.
Add items by scanning the MyKasih QRcode.
Fix eWaiter void transaction will not include in void order.
Fix after set schedule backup with CN language, when re-enter the setting, will encounter error.
fixes: Fix Serial Number stock transfer negative balance quantity issue.
Fix view Deposit Posting Report to cater with E-Invoice deposit.
Fix error at fast selection menu when enable Show Auto Filter Row.
Fix Report Design Center for POS report prompt error during design.
Fix e-Invoice submission will exclude tax if use custom tax code.
Fix e-Invoice Find Bill there submit will now follow e-Invoice monitor report format.
Fix Error prompt: "Index (zero based) must be greater than or equal to zero" occurs when the auto-numbering format is left empty in Terminal Settings Maintenance.
Fix some data at profile table which does not include during synchronization that resulted profile does not tally at backend and frontend.
Fix after delivered for SO, completed payment time will update again.
Fix after being consolidated, e-Invoice monitor will not clear past invalid and failed submission figure.
Fix POS serial number and batch issue if item fall into both categories.
Fix Top Bottom POS Sales Ranking unable to Inquiry when filter by Ranking Type set to master value.
Fix DMF file cannot be saved properly when creating a new database from the POS backend for the first time.
Fix Pos Posting without using AR numbering will get duplicate AR docno during repost after cancelled.
Fix promotion listing shows duplicate items.
Fix custom payment shortcut button will always capture alternative printer issue.
Fix Sync Client Services dependencies issue that cause installation services mark for deletion for POS B.
Fix alignment issue when you have filter criteria on certain report.
Fix Top and Bottom report inquiry error when filter by member.
Fix login with a thumbprint does not properly clear the user session.

features: Support automatically "Direct Submit" e-Invoice if debtor is selected in the transaction.
Payment button sequence include debit card and custom payment.
QR2E allows users to request an e-Invoice on previous month before performing consolidation.
Allow to resync POS transactions that have not sync back to backend.
Support Business Date.
Enhance iPay88 & GHL DuitNowQR timeout display.
Enforce transactions over RM 10,000 to prompt warning if did not submit as regular e-Invoice.
Fix second display could not display image link from HTTP URL.
Fix credit card amount does not capture remaining balance in multi payment.
Fix fast selection menu if input multiple item into the menu, the seq number generated is same and will affect the sequence of your menu causing them not able to move up and down from the sequence.
Fix fast selection menu description if use Chinese character, system will not be able to Design Menu Header.
Fix SO can still access E-Wallet payment by using shortcut button.
Fix change code for MemberNo will not sync MultiPricing to the new MemberNo that you just changed.
Fix Must Generate E-Invoice in relaxation period still force user to submit e-Invoice.
fixes: Fix cancel POS Posting will not reset posted transaction to non-posted.
Fix promotion discount with item package / set meal resulting in inconsistent promotion amount.
Fix could not send by email (via SMTP Server) at preview report.
Fix item package / set meal, discounted by unit price with percentage resulting in incorrect discount amount.
Fix POS sync foreign key issue when user deleted foreign key before sync occurred.
Fix change UOM will not change UserUOM as well.
Fix Search Item "Load all when startup" options does not include UDF.
Fix promotion amount shows 0.00 if your unit price is 0.00 after promotion.
Fix modifier min max control prompt on items that do not apply if there are 2 sets of menus with modifier min max control.
Fix bank charges tax code does not apply in Receipt Voucher after pos posting.
Fix Multi-Dimensional POS Analysis shows incorrect figure due to quantity will multiply by PaymentType.
Fix OneReward E-Voucher will be considered as an open item and will reflect on reporting that will cause incorrect figures.
Fix POS Session Report cashier ID is not displayed in the report.
Fix when accessing Daily Sales Report, "Column 'TotalExTax' does not belong to table" error occurred.
Fix merge item Unique Key error if item is maintained in Pos Item Commission as well.
Fix fast selection menu when deleting item and then re-adding new item will prompt error.
Fix promotion with total discount by amount when after promotion the amount is 0, the extra discount is incorrect.
Fix blank custom payment type error when sync if payment amount is empty during payment.
Fix import transaction from backend to frontend indicate success but no transaction was imported.
Fix when import fast selection menu, "column 'AllowTakeAway' does not allow nulls" error occurred.

features: Remove the Account Group's module control in POS Terminal maintenance.
Fix Multi-Dimensional POS Analysis reporting issue if did not use merge item.
Fix POS frontend backup error.
Fix Pos Posting duplicate posting issue.
Fix close counter report start time follow open session instead of open counter time.
Fix refund hold bill refer document number will gone after recall bill.
Fix purge transaction inquiry no data even after perform pos posting.
Fix E-Wallet DuitNow issue if placed on first row.
Fix A920 cache issue that will auto save 2nd transaction.
Support scheduled backups at the POS frontend.
Enhance auto updates for frontend.
X and Z report add Start & End Bill Number series.
Display payment type description for better and more clarified presentation during payment.
Pos Session Report: Add Description and Desc2 at Item Summary.
Set an interval to check the payment status from Fiuu DuitNow QR.
Fix hold bill missing info at customer information after recall bill.
Fix POS Session Z Report cash out does not have (-) symbol.
Fix PWPkey is null when edit expiry promotion.
Fix OneRewards auto sync for backend to be working properly even if there is no changelog.
Fix during the initial setup of the new front-end database, select member feature is not activated.
Fix not able to detect IC card reader if use 64bit POS frontend.
Fix refund note Invalid Document References Validator issue.
Fix member multi price with empty or null multi price error during scan item issue.
Fix frontend services do not auto start properly under certain condition.
Fix after merge Tax Entity, speed sync will get error.
Fix second LCD screen for 800 x 600 some font did fit into the screen.

fixes: Fix DateTime issue for E-Invoice submission at frontend.
Fix 64-bit compatibility issue.
Fix Price Plan will generate null value.
Fix could not view IPHIST in POS transaction.

features: License control for E-Invoice QR Submission (QR2E).
Enhance Multi-Dimensional POS Analysis to be able to show payment type.
Runs the application in 64-bit mode by default.
Adjust the image alignment to centered at customer display.
Optimize purge transaction speed.
Remove Auto Update Option at frontend.
Fix recall bill able to bypass backorder control.
Fix choose sales type always in front of other application even after alt + tab.
Fix class not registered (Exception from HRESULT: 0x80040154 (REGDB_E_CLASSNOTREG)) which caused by Customer Display compatibility issue.
Fix column 'UserID' does not allow nulls from HoldBill.
Fix column 'DebtorCode' does not allow nulls from ARPayment.
Fix not able to void transaction at frontend after voided the consolidated invoice.
Fix POS posting journal entry is not balanced when the transaction includes a service charge and is paid using Point Payment Account.
Fix LHDN validation link does not appear during print or preview from the POS Transaction Viewer.
Fix OneRewards - Display proper message during point payment if users forget to input member.
Fix POS frontend should not allow the selection of a debtor control account (Group Company).
Fix Submit E-Invoice for Government not valid issue.
Fix frontend do not get response from A920 under certain condition.
Support GHL E-Wallet and E-Wallet.
Optimize POS Server Monitor not to show inactive outlet.
Add E-Invoice services checking during launch and restart button at E-Invoice Monitor.
Debtor Do Not Submit e-Invoice to be function in POS as well.
fixes: Fix MustGenerateEInvoice item take affect even if E-Invoice setting disabled.
Fix able to enter 0 quantity if use quantity * itemcode at barcode textbox.
Fix set column 'CCApprovalCode'. The value violates the MaxLength limit of this column.
Fix not able to do Posting if payment by cash first then followed by point.
Fix E-Invoice identity type does not follow debtor TIN identity type.
Fix could not detect serial no item if used with batch no.
Fix POS Transaction Find Form, clicking 'View' prompts a 'Not allowed to edit' message, whereas the POS Transaction Viewer opens the transaction without issue.
Fix Credit Sales collected and variances issue.
Fix barcode selection prompt when scanning itemcode or barcode.
Fix testing mode standard receipt for Z report did not capture cash in/out amount.
Fix POS B attach Invalid Document Number Format issue.
Fix Full Sync Item Serial No primary key error.
Fix API issue during save transaction.

features: Merge various setting forms into a single tree list structure.
Add a shortcut to view the Staff Attendance Report on the Staff Attendance screen.
Optimize OneRewards member migration performance.
Support local IP 172.16.xx.xx for POS A.
fixes: Fix frontend successfully changed payment method but does not reflect on POS transaction payment amount.
Fix compare trans at POS Monitor Status to display filtered date properly.
Fix Void Item Package will increase the qty of Sold Qty and Bal Qty.
Fix Could not Auto Update POS frontend after version 5.2.
Fix member debtor code able to copy paste text and save non exists debtor code.

features: Support sync debtor by batch.
Add "Copy to New Transaction" access right control.
POS server monitor status to include compare trans for E-Invoice status.
Enhance submit Consolidated E-Invoice at backend to be able to submit till last trans finish sync time.

Enhance direct submit E-invoice field requirement.
Remove MyInvois QR feature.
fixes: Fix advance multi UOM will prompt backorder control even though stock is sufficient.

features: Optimise Full Sync for item with serial number. Document Prepared by Jacky.

Fix Option “Always Prompt Customer Info Dialog” not functioning for E-Invoice.
Fix Pos Posting with credit card service charges issue.
Fix promotion non-member and member discount overlapped.
Fix after upgrade, POS user access right disappear.
Fix submit E-Invoice for Government could not submit due to Business RegNo.

POS Release Note 5.2.6.14 Auto Count Sdn Bhd (751600-A) www.autocountsoft.com B2-3A-01, Level 3A, Block B2, Meritus @ Oasis Corporate Park, No.2, Jalan PJU 1A/2, Ara Damansara, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor Darul Ehsan. Tel: 603-3080 8888 Fax: 603-7621 0911 Page6 ID:20672 Enhance E-Invoice email processing flow. There are some flaws on previous versions of email processing flow for E-Invoice which cause inconvenience for the user. Therefore, we have made amendments and enhancements for better user experience. Direct Submit INVALID - will not send email to notify user, after resubmitting to VALID, send email to notify user. VALID - will send email to notify user. QR Submission INVALID - will send email to notify user INVALID, need to go back to cashier for direct submit. After resubmitting to VALID, send email to notify user. VALID - will send E-mail to notify user.

features: Support E-Invoice Issue Date when submit E-Invoice.

fixes: Fix not able to void transaction after consolidated at backend. POS Release Note 5.2.1.3

Support E-Invoice issue date when submit E-Invoice. Some customers may want to submit E-Invoice after a certain period. They might come back and request for E- Invoice. Thus, we have added a new field to record E-Invoice issue date for those customers who wish to submit past invoice (within this month).

features: Allow to change payment method at frontend.
